data.title: Nasdaq declares quarterly dividend of $0.27 per share, payable on Sept 26, 2025 to shareholders of record on Sept 12, 2025.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, Nasdaq, Inc. announced a regular quarterly dividend of $0.27 per share for its common stock (Nasdaq: NDAQ). Shareholders of record at the close of business on September 12, 2025, will receive the dividend on September 26, 2025. The approval of future quarterly dividends, as well as the determination of record and payment dates, is at the discretion of Nasdaq's Board of Directors.

data.title: Valley National Bancorp's Q2 2025 net income is $133.2 million, $0.22 per share, up from Q1 2025's $106.1 million, $0.18 per share. Adjusted net income is $134.4 million, $0.23 per share.
data.description: In the second quarter of 2025, Valley National Bancorp, the holding company for Valley National Bank, announced a net income of $133.2 million, equivalent to $0.22 per diluted common share. This represents an increase from the first quarter of 2025, where the net income was $106.1 million ($0.18 per diluted common share), and the second quarter of 2024, with a net income of $70.4 million ($0.13 per diluted common share). Excluding non-core income and charges, the adjusted net income for the second quarter of 2025 was $134.4 million ($0.23 per diluted common share), compared to $106.1 million ($0.18 per diluted common share) in the first quarter of 2025 and $71.6 million ($0.13 per diluted common share) in the second quarter of 2024. Further details, including a reconciliation of non-GAAP adjusted net income, can be found in the "Consolidated Financial Highlights" tables.

data.title: Nasdaq's Q2 2025 results show double-digit net revenue growth across all divisions, as per July 24 report. Moving strong.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, Nasdaq, Inc. (Nasdaq: NDAQ) released its financial results for Q2 2025.
Company reveals Q2 2025 financial results.

data.title: MultiBank.io partners with Fireblocks to tokenize $10 billion in real estate assets, aiming to enhance investment opportunities securely and compliantly.
data.description: MultiBank Group, the leading financial derivatives institution globally, revealed that its digital asset division, MultiBank.io, will be leveraging Fireblocks for a groundbreaking real estate tokenization project. This platform aims to tokenize $10 billion worth of real-world assets, facilitating secure and compliant investment opportunities. The initial phase of this initiative stems from MultiBank.io’s significant partnership, valued at $3 billion, with MAG Lifes.

data.title: Dime Community Bancshares, Inc. had a strong Q2 in 2025 with earnings per share up by 49% year-over-year.
data.description: Dime Community Bancshares, Inc. has released its impressive performance for the second quarter of 2025. The company reported a substantial increase in earnings per share by 49% compared to the same period last year. This strong growth highlights the firm's financial strength and management's effective strategies. Investors will likely view this positive development as a sign of the company's solid performance and potential for future success.

data.title: Mobileye reports strong Q2 2025 performance, raises full-year outlook, revenue growth. CEO optimistic despite cautious stance.
data.description: Jerusalem-based Mobileye Global Inc. (Nasdaq: MBLY) has announced its financial results for Q2 ending on June 28, 2025. The company reported strong performance in revenue growth and cost management during this period. Due to improved visibility on industry supply-demand dynamics since late April, Mobileye has raised its full-year outlook. Despite this positive outlook, the company remains cautious due to broader macroeconomic factors. The President and CEO of Mobileye expressed satisfaction with the business's performance in the second quarter.

data.title: Crypto thefts exceed $3.1B in 2025 due to access issues, says Hacken. Weak access control is a major factor.
data.description: A report by Hacken reveals that in 2025, over $3.1 billion worth of cryptocurrency has been reported as lost. The main reason behind this significant loss is access-control exploits.

data.title: Visteon reports Q2 2025 results: Sales $969M, Net income $65M, Adjusted EBITDA $134M, Operating cash flow $165M. Dividend initiated.
data.description: In Van Buren Township, Michigan on July 24, 2025, Visteon Corporation (NASDAQ: VC) released their financial results for the second quarter. The key figures from the report include sales totaling $969 million, with a net income of $65 million and adjusted EBITDA of $134 million. The company also reported operating cash flow of $165 million.

data.title: Bread Financial reported performance update for June 2025 with net loss rate and delinquency rate data.
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, on July 24, 2025, Bread Financial Holdings, Inc. announced its latest financial performance. The company, listed on the NYSE as BFH, specializes in tech-based financial services catering to millions of American customers. They shared data revealing their net loss rate and delinquency rate for the specified periods. This data sheds light on the company's performance and risk management strategies.

data.title: ADT Inc. (NYSE: ADT) reports Q2 2025 results showing higher total revenue and recurring monthly revenue.
data.description: Security company ADT Inc. (NYSE: ADT) released its second quarter 2025 earnings report today. The company saw growth in both total revenue and end-of-period recurring monthly revenue.

data.title: L3Harris Technologies has strong Q2 2025 results with $5.4 billion revenue and $2.44 diluted EPS, increasing guidance.
data.description: L3Harris Technologies, a company listed under NYSE as LHX, recently announced their financial results for the second quarter of 2025. The diluted earnings per share (EPS) for this period were $2.44, with total revenue reaching $5.4 billion. The non-GAAP diluted EPS stood at $2.78 during the same quarter. Moreover, the company boasted a record book-to-bill ratio of 1.5x, demonstrating strong organic growth. Additionally, there was a consistent year-over-year expansion in adjusted segment operating margin for the seventh consecutive quarter. Further details and reconciliations of non-GAAP results can be found in the tables starting on page 11 of the report.

data.title: Ryder announces Q2 2025 earnings update.
data.description: In response to the recent surge in COVID-19 cases, the government has announced new restrictions across the country. As of next week, gatherings of more than 50 people will be banned, and restaurants and bars will have to operate at only 50% capacity. Additionally, a nighttime curfew will be implemented from 10 pm to 5 am. These measures come as daily cases have reached record highs, with over 5,000 new infections reported in the last 24 hours. The healthcare system is under strain, with hospitals at 90% capacity. The government is urging the public to follow guidelines to curb the spread of the virus and avoid overwhelming the healthcare system.

data.title: Tractor Supply Co (NASDQ: TSCO) reports Q2 2025 net sales grew 4.5% to $4.44 billion, with EPS of $0.81.
data.description: In Brentwood, Tennessee, Tractor Supply Company (NASDAQ: TSCO), the top rural lifestyle retailer in the US, announced its financial results for the quarter ending on June 28, 2025. Net sales rose by 4.5% to reach $4.44 billion, with comparable store sales growing by 1.5%. Moreover, there was a 1.0% growth in comparable average transaction. The company reported diluted earnings per share (“EPS”) of $0.81. The company expressed satisfaction with its second-quarter performance, indicating robust core category performance.

data.title: Corero Network Security ranked top in 2025 SPARK Matrix for SmartWall ONE™ and CORE solution. Leader & Innovator.
data.description: Corero Network Security (Ticker: CNS) has achieved an impressive ranking, showcasing the high demand for SmartWall ONE™ and their latest solution, CORE. The London-based company was recognized as a Leader and Emerging Innovator in the DDoS protection sector. This achievement was highlighted on July 24, 2025, consolidating their position in the market. Corero Network Security, traded on AIM under CNS and on OTCQX under DDOSF, continues to progress and innovate in the industry, catering to the needs of a rapidly evolving digital landscape.

data.title: Fapon to showcase IVD solutions at ADLM 2025 in Chicago from July 29-31, aiming to be trusted partner with innovative offerings.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, Fapon, a prominent player in the field of life sciences, is set to showcase its cutting-edge comprehensive in-vitro diagnostics solutions at ADLM 2025 in Chicago, IL from July 29 to 31. By presenting these innovative offerings, Fapon is striving to become the go-to international collaborator for laboratories and in-vitro diagnostics manufacturers.

data.title: Labcorp Q2 2025: Revenue $3.53B vs $3.22B in Q2 2024. EPS $2.84 vs $2.43. Adjusted EPS $4.35 vs $3.94. Raised full-year guidance.
data.description: The company has raised its full-year guidance after reporting financial results for the second quarter of 2025 compared to the same period in 2024. Revenue increased to $3.53 billion from $3.22 billion, while diluted earnings per share rose to $2.84 from $2.43. Adjusted earnings per share also showed growth, reaching $4.35 compared to $3.94. In light of these positive results, the company has raised its enterprise revenue, adjusted earnings per share, and free cash flow guidance for the remainder of the year.
